label: Active
description: The tracked entity is currently available in its normal public form.

label: Active / Changed
description: The tracked entity remains available but has materially changed.

label: Shutdown
description: The tracked entity is no longer available as a public product or service.

label: Shutdown Announced
description: A shutdown has been announced but the effective date may be in the future.

label: Acquired
description: The tracked entity or its operator was acquired.

label: Merged
description: The tracked entity was merged into another product, service, or brand.

label: Rebranded
description: The tracked entity moved to a new name or brand.

label: Deprecated
description: The tracked entity has been marked for replacement or retirement.

label: Retired
description: The tracked entity has been retired or removed after a lifecycle transition.

label: Unknown
description: The current state cannot be determined from available public evidence.
